steps.title: Spot the concluding claim
steps.content: The passage ends with the team’s conclusion that postcranial skeletal pneumaticity likely evolved independently in each clade, which is the central point being made.

steps.title: Match the conclusion to the choices
steps.content: Choice D states that Aureliano et al. found the clades likely lacked a common ancestor with the trait and therefore propose a different origin than earlier studies, which directly captures the idea of independent evolution. The other three either misstate the findings, introduce unrelated details about technology, or suggest inheritance rather than independent origins. That matches choice D — D is correct.
